MINI MINUTES: OFF CALENDAR, MOTION TO RECONSIDER DEPT. 212 SANCTIONS ORDER TO BE CALENDARED IN DEPT. 212.

Plaintiff'S Motion To Reconsider And Vacate Sanctions. Calendared In Wrong Dept. Moving Papers Designated Correct Department. (212)
Off Calendar Mar-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to reconsider and vacate sanctions issued on 2/26/2002 to Daniel J. Kelly, Esq., in the amount of $200.00, is heard scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. (212)
